seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Weerriba and Weipa Airport. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogTitle: Weerriba vs Weipa Airport: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Weerriba and Weipa Airport.
heading: Weerriba vs Weipa Airport — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Weerriba, Queensland and Weipa Airport, Queensland. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Weipa Airport has a lower overall climate risk score (34/100) compared to Weerriba (37/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Weerriba or Weipa Airport safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Weerriba has a flood risk score of 22/100, while Weipa Airport scores 26/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Weerriba scores 47/100 for bushfire risk. Weipa Airport scores 65/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Weerriba or Weipa Airport?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Weipa Airport has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 0.98% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
